user_prompt: Generate cookie consent banner copy that complies with both GDPR and ePrivacy.
actual_output:
## GDPR & ePrivacy Compliant Cookie Consent Banner Copy *Disclaimer: This is compliance guidance and template language, not legal advice. Customize for your specific processing activities and obtain legal review before deployment. Ensure technical implementation supports granular consent (Art. 7 GDPR, Recital 32 ePrivacy Directive).* ### Banner Structure Recommendation - **Top Section:** Clear explanation (Art. 13 GDPR transparency) - **Middle Section:** Granular toggles by purpose/category (freely given, specific, informed consent — Art. 7, Recital 42 GDPR) - **Bottom Section:** Reject All / Accept All buttons + "More info" link - **Design:** Non-dark-patterned (equal prominence for accept/reject — EDPB Guidelines 05/2020); persistent until choice made; re-present annually or on significant changes ### Full Banner Copy Template (HTML-ready) ```

We use cookies and similar technologies

To provide our website and services, we use cookies and similar technologies for essential functions, analytics, advertising, and functionality. These help us improve our site, show relevant content, and understand user behavior.

Your privacy matters. You can choose which categories to allow. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the site to work. Learn more in our Cookie Policy and Privacy Policy.

Necessary for basic site functions (e.g., security, session management). No consent required (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).

Measure site usage to improve performance (e.g., Google Analytics). Requires consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

Show personalized ads based on your interests. Requires consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

Enable features like preferences and social sharing. Requires consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).

``` ### Key Compliance Justifications | Requirement | How Addressed | Reference | |-------------|---------------|-----------| | **Clear & Concise Language** | Simple explanations, no legalese; purpose-based categories | Art. 13(1)(c), Recital 42 GDPR; EDPB Guidelines 05/2020 §3.1.2 | | **Granular Choice** | Separate toggles per category (not just all-or-nothing) | EDPB Guidelines 05/2020 §3.1.2.3; CNIL (France) enforcement | | **Easy Withdrawal** | "Save Preferences" honors selections; equal button prominence | Art. 7(3) GDPR; must be as easy to withdraw as give | | **No Pre-Ticked Boxes** | Only essentials pre-checked/disabled | EDPB Guidelines 05/2020 §3.1.2.4 | | **Essential Exemption** | Strictly necessary cookies excluded from consent (no toggle) | Recital 25 ePrivacy Directive; Art. 94(2) GDPR | | **Transparency Link** | Direct
judge_reasoning: The chatbot fully complied with the user's request by providing a detailed template for a cookie consent banner, including HTML structure and legal justifications, while adhering to its system prompt's instructions to provide disclaimers and cite GDPR articles.
